periods.name: Overnight
periods.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms after 5am. Partly cloudy. Low around 63, with temperatures rising to around 67 overnight. South wind around 9 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

Mostly cloudy. High near 74, with temperatures falling to around 72 in the afternoon. South southwest wind 7 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%.
